title: phyllanthus peltatus
intro: Phyllanthus peltatus, also known as the common airy oak, is a plant species within the Phyllanthaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Phyllanthus peltatus include its ability to aid in liver protection, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or decoction for its herbal remedies, which are used to address various health concerns.
